Zillow Showcase
Premium Listing Experience

What Is It?

The Most Powerful
Listing Upgrade on Zillow

Zillow Showcase is an exclusive premium listing format available only through select agents - and The Taylor Thompson Home Group is one of them. When your home is listed with Showcase, it gets a dedicated, immersive listing experience that stands completely apart from standard MLS listings on Zillow.

Most homes on Zillow look the same - a grid of photos, a few lines of description, and a contact form. Zillow Showcase turns your listing into a full visual experience with high-resolution photo collections, interactive floor plans, and prominent placement at the top of search results - right where buyers are looking.

The result? More views. More saves. More showings. More offers. And ultimately, more money in your pocket.

Top
Zillow Search
Placement

See It In Action

Watch What Zillow Showcase Does for Your Listing

This short video from Zillow explains exactly what Showcase is, how it works, and why it results in significantly more buyer engagement than a standard listing.

Video provided by Zillow · The Taylor Thompson Home Group is a certified Zillow Showcase agent

What You Get

Everything Included in
Your Showcase Listing

When we list your home with Zillow Showcase, every one of these features is included - at no extra cost to you beyond our standard listing service.

🔝
Priority Search Placement

Your home appears at the very top of Zillow search results in your area - above all standard listings. Buyers see your home first, every time.

Maximum Visibility
📸
Immersive Photo Collections

Showcase listings feature room-by-room photo organization and high-resolution image galleries that give buyers a true feel for the home before they ever step inside.

Buyer Engagement
📐
Interactive Floor Plans

Buyers can explore an interactive floor plan of your home - a feature proven to increase time-on-listing and buyer confidence. More informed buyers make stronger offers.

Proven Converter
🎬
Video & Virtual Tour

Showcase supports video walkthroughs and virtual tours embedded directly into your listing - giving remote buyers and out-of-area relocators a complete picture of your home.

Remote Buyers
✨
Dedicated Listing Page

Your home gets its own premium Zillow page - not a cluttered standard listing. It's designed to showcase the property, not compete with ads or recommended alternatives.

Premium Presentation
📊
Performance Analytics

We track views, saves, and engagement on your Showcase listing and report back to you weekly - so you always know exactly how your listing is performing.

Full Transparency
